name: planalot
description: Lightweight local plan conversation daemon and browser UI for agent planning workflows.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @planalot/shared build && pnpm --filter @planalot/pi build && pnpm --filter @planalot/cc build && pnpm --filter @planalot/codex build && pnpm --filter @planalot/web build && pnpm --filter @planalot/daemon build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @planalot/shared build && pnpm --filter @planalot/pi build && pnpm --filter @planalot/cc build && pnpm --filter @planalot/codex typecheck && pnpm --filter @planalot/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @planalot/daemon typecheck
